extraction.one_line_summary: CARTHY Hugh won Stage 12 by attacking inside final kilometer on Alto de Angliru, gaining 16 seconds on VLASOV/MAS and taking 10 seconds on CARAPAZ who seized the overall lead from ROGLIČ.
tactical_patterns: CARAPAZ nearly bridged to CARTHY at 800m to go but CARTHY's redoubled acceleration created decisive 16-second gap at finish.
MAS attacked from long range as most aggressive GC rider, enabling CARTHY's later winning move rather than winning himself.
ROGLIČ defended passively on Angliru despite only 10-second deficit, suggesting confidence in upcoming time trial over climbing duel.

rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: positive: First grand tour stage win shows he can finish climbs harder than established GC riders, gained 16s on MAS/VLASOV.
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: Nearly caught CARTHY at 800m despite no stage win, took jersey with offensive riding rather than defensive time management.
rider_signals.MAS Enric: neutral: Long-range aggression as most attacking rider failed to produce stage win, but defended podium position effectively.
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: negative: Lost jersey without visible response on final climb, banking strategy entirely on Tuesday time trial rather than defending.
rider_signals.POELS Wout: positive: Moved to 6th overall despite difficult conditions, showing consistent GC form beyond domestique expectations.
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: positive: Finished 3rd on stage only seconds behind CARTHY, moved into top 10 overall with strong climbing performance.
